description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot surrounded by dense, mature trees, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The building features a flat roof and a clean, linear architectural style, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a landscaped garden and pool area. The front of the property is accessed by a straight driveway leading to a garage, while the backyard includes a patio, pool, and outdoor seating areas. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with visible wooden accents in the outdoor spaces. The garden is meticulously landscaped, featuring lawns, flower beds, and paved walkways. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow surrounded by dense trees, featuring large glass windows, a landscaped garden, and a pool. The property includes a driveway, garage, and extensive outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front driveway leading to the main entrance and garage, with the bungalow and landscaped garden visible behind a dense tree line.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the pool, patio, and outdoor seating areas, with the house stretching across the width of the plot.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the property from the opposite end of the driveway, emphasizing the main building's roof and the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side perspective, displaying the length of the bungalow, the pool area, and the dense tree border.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
